---
title: "Projects"
---

Things I'm building.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Locker](locker.qmd)
Enterprise skill middleware for Claude Code teams. Share AI knowledge securely across your org — without every employee reinventing the wheel.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [ContextOS](contextos.qmd)
A context engineering platform for firms. The bottleneck to AI adoption isn't the AI — it's the context. ContextOS is the infrastructure that fixes that.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Claude Code Skills](skills.qmd)
40+ skills built and curated for AI-powered development workflows — from browser automation to parallel worktree orchestration to self-improving skill optimizers.
:::

:::
